revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
{{Category other |{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^.+–.+ relations$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=titlenotmatched }}|titlenotmatched|{{error|message=ERROR. [[Template:Foo–Bar relations category]] has been used on a category with an invalid name.
This template is for use only on category pages, which must be named "Category:Foo–Bar relations", where "Foo" and "Bar" are both names of countries.
The separator between the two names must be an [[endash]].}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^–$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=noendash}}|noendash|
{{error|message=ERROR: This page's title does not include an [[endash]].}}}}[[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations category on page with invalid title]]|{{Foo–Bar relations category/core | country1 = {{#invoke:String|replace|source={{#invoke:String|replace|source={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=–.+$|replace=|count=1|plain=false}}|pattern=^[tT]he |replace=|count=1|plain=false}} | country2 = {{#invoke:String|replace|source={{#invoke:String|replace|source={{#invoke:String|replace|source={{PAGENAME}}|pattern= relations$|replace=|count=1|plain=false}}|pattern=^.+–|replace=|count=1|plain=false}}|pattern=^[tT]he |replace=|count=1|plain=false}} | main = {{{main|}}} | mapname = {{{map|}}} }}{{#if: {{{main|}}} | [[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations category with specified main article]] {{#ifexist: {{{main|}}}||[[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations category with non-existent specified main article]]}}}}{{#if: {{{map|}}} | [[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations category with specified map]] {{#ifexist: Media:{{{map|}}}||[[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations category with non-existent specified map]]
{{Error|The file specified in the "map" parameter does not exist: [[:File:{{{map}}}]]}}}}}}}}|{{error|message=Foo–Bar relations category: used on non-category page.
This template is for use only only category pages, which must be named "Category:Foo–Bar relations", where "Foo" and "Bar" are both names of countries}}[[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations on non-category page]]}}{{Automatic category TOC}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Category other |{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^.+–.+ relations$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=titlenotmatched }}|titlenotmatched|{{error|message=ERROR. [[Template:Foo–Bar relations category]] has been used on a category with an invalid name.
This template is for use only on category pages, which must be named "Category:Foo–Bar relations", where "Foo" and "Bar" are both names of countries.
The separator between the two names must be an [[endash]].}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^–$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=noendash}}|noendash|
{{error|message=ERROR: This page's title does not include an [[endash]].}}}}[[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations category on page with invalid title]]|{{Foo–Bar relations category/core | country1 = {{#invoke:String|replace|source={{#invoke:String|replace|source={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=–.+$|replace=|count=1|plain=false}}|pattern=^[tT]he |replace=|count=1|plain=false}} | country2 = {{#invoke:String|replace|source={{#invoke:String|replace|source={{#invoke:String|replace|source={{PAGENAME}}|pattern= relations$|replace=|count=1|plain=false}}|pattern=^.+–|replace=|count=1|plain=false}}|pattern=^[tT]he |replace=|count=1|plain=false}} | main = {{{main|}}} | mapname = {{{map|}}} }}{{#if: {{{main|}}} | [[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations category with specified main article]] {{#ifexist: {{{main|}}}||[[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations category with non-existent specified main article]]}}}}{{#if: {{{map|}}} | [[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations category with specified map]] {{#ifexist: Media:{{{map|}}}||[[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations category with non-existent specified map]]
{{Error|The file specified in the "map" parameter does not exist: [[:File:{{{map}}}]]}}}}}}}}|{{error|message=Foo–Bar relations category: used on non-category page.
This template is for use only only category pages, which must be named "Category:Foo–Bar relations", where "Foo" and "Bar" are both names of countries}}[[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations on non-category page]]}}{{Automatic category TOC}} {{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Category other |{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^.+–.+ relations$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=titlenotmatched }}|titlenotmatched|{{error|message=ERROR. [[Template:Foo–Bar relations category]] has been used on a category with an invalid name.
This template is for use only on category pages, which must be named "Category:Foo–Bar relations", where "Foo" and "Bar" are both names of countries.
The separator between the two names must be an [[endash]].}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^–$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=noendash}}|noendash|
{{error|message=ERROR: This page's title does not include an [[endash]].}}}}[[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations category on page with invalid title]]|{{Foo–Bar relations category/core | country1 = {{#invoke:String|replace|source={{#invoke:String|replace|source={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=–.+$|replace=|count=1|plain=false}}|pattern=^[tT]he |replace=|count=1|plain=false}} | country2 = {{#invoke:String|replace|source={{#invoke:String|replace|source={{#invoke:String|replace|source={{PAGENAME}}|pattern= relations$|replace=|count=1|plain=false}}|pattern=^.+–|replace=|count=1|plain=false}}|pattern=^[tT]he |replace=|count=1|plain=false}} | main = {{{main|}}} | mapname = {{{map|}}} }}{{#if: {{{main|}}} | [[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations category with specified main article]] {{#ifexist: {{{main|}}}||[[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations category with non-existent specified main article]]}}}}{{#if: {{{map|}}} | [[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations category with specified map]] {{#ifexist: Media:{{{map|}}}||[[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations category with non-existent specified map]]
{{Error|The file specified in the "map" parameter does not exist: [[:File:{{{map}}}]]}}}}}}}}|{{error|message=Foo–Bar relations category: used on non-category page.
This template is for use only only category pages, which must be named "Category:Foo–Bar relations", where "Foo" and "Bar" are both names of countries}}[[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations on non-category page]]}}{{Automatic category TOC}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Category other |{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^.+–.+ relations$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=titlenotmatched }}|titlenotmatched|{{error|message=ERROR. [[Template:Foo–Bar relations category]] has been used on a category with an invalid name.

The separator between the two names must be an [[endash]].}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^–$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=noendash}}|noendash|

This template is for use only only category pages, which must be named "Category:Foo–Bar relations", where "Foo" and "Bar" are both names of countries}}[[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations on non-category page]]}}{{Automatic category TOC}} {{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
{{Category other |{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^.+–.+ relations$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=titlenotmatched }}|titlenotmatched|{{error|message=ERROR. [[Template:Foo–Bar relations category]] has been used on a category with an invalid name.

The separator between the two names must be an [[endash]].}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^–$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=noendash}}|noendash|

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 7 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410180721|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Category other |{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^.+–.+ relations$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=titlenotmatched }}|titlenotmatched|{{error|message=ERROR. [[Template:Foo–Bar relations category]] has been used on a category with an invalid name.
This template is for use only on category pages, which must be named "Category:Foo–Bar relations", where "Foo" and "Bar" are both names of countries.
The separator between the two names must be an [[endash]].}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^–$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=noendash}}|noendash|
{{error|message=ERROR: This page's title does not include an [[endash]].}}}}|{{Foo–Bar relations category/core | country1 = {{#invoke:String|replace|source={{#invoke:String|replace|source={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=–.+$|replace=|count=1|plain=false}}|pattern=^[tT]he |replace=|count=1|plain=false}} | country2 = {{#invoke:String|replace|source={{#invoke:String|replace|source={{#invoke:String|replace|source={{PAGENAME}}|pattern= relations$|replace=|count=1|plain=false}}|pattern=^.+–|replace=|count=1|plain=false}}|pattern=^[tT]he |replace=|count=1|plain=false}} | main = {{{main|}}} | mapname = {{{map|}}} }}{{#if: {{{main|}}} | {{#ifexist: {{{main|}}}||}}}}{{#if: {{{map|}}} | {{#ifexist: Media:{{{map|}}}||
{{Error|The file specified in the "map" parameter does not exist: [[:File:{{{map}}}]]}}}}}}}}|{{error|message=Foo–Bar relations category: used on non-category page.
This template is for use only only category pages, which must be named "Category:Foo–Bar relations", where "Foo" and "Bar" are both names of countries}}}}{{Automatic category TOC}} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations category on page with invalid title]] [[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations category with specified main article]] [[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations category with non-existent specified main article]] [[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations category with specified map]] [[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations category with non-existent specified map]] [[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations on non-category page]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Foo%E2%80%93Bar_relations_category here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Category other |{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^.+–.+ relations$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=titlenotmatched }}|titlenotmatched|{{error|message=ERROR. [[Template:Foo–Bar relations category]] has been used on a category with an invalid name.
This template is for use only on category pages, which must be named "Category:Foo–Bar relations", where "Foo" and "Bar" are both names of countries.
The separator between the two names must be an [[endash]].}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^–$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=noendash}}|noendash|
{{error|message=ERROR: This page's title does not include an [[endash]].}}}}|{{Foo–Bar relations category/core | country1 = {{#invoke:String|replace|source={{#invoke:String|replace|source={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=–.+$|replace=|count=1|plain=false}}|pattern=^[tT]he |replace=|count=1|plain=false}} | country2 = {{#invoke:String|replace|source={{#invoke:String|replace|source={{#invoke:String|replace|source={{PAGENAME}}|pattern= relations$|replace=|count=1|plain=false}}|pattern=^.+–|replace=|count=1|plain=false}}|pattern=^[tT]he |replace=|count=1|plain=false}} | main = {{{main|}}} | mapname = {{{map|}}} }}{{#if: {{{main|}}} | {{#ifexist: {{{main|}}}||}}}}{{#if: {{{map|}}} | {{#ifexist: Media:{{{map|}}}||
{{Error|The file specified in the "map" parameter does not exist: [[:File:{{{map}}}]]}}}}}}}}|{{error|message=Foo–Bar relations category: used on non-category page.
This template is for use only only category pages, which must be named "Category:Foo–Bar relations", where "Foo" and "Bar" are both names of countries}}}}{{Automatic category TOC}} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations category on page with invalid title]] [[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations category with specified main article]] [[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations category with non-existent specified main article]] [[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations category with specified map]] [[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations category with non-existent specified map]] [[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations on non-category page]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Category other |{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^.+–.+ relations$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=titlenotmatched }}|titlenotmatched|{{error|message=ERROR. [[Template:Foo–Bar relations category]] has been used on a category with an invalid name.
This template is for use only on category pages, which must be named "Category:Foo–Bar relations", where "Foo" and "Bar" are both names of countries.
The separator between the two names must be an [[endash]].}}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^–$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=noendash}}|noendash|

This template is for use only only category pages, which must be named "Category:Foo–Bar relations", where "Foo" and "Bar" are both names of countries}}}}{{Automatic category TOC}} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations category on page with invalid title]] [[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations category with specified main article]] [[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations category with non-existent specified main article]] [[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations category with specified map]] [[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations category with non-existent specified map]] [[Category:Template Foo–Bar relations on non-category page]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
